message:
test: update tests for ExpandPath refactor + beads sync

Update test files to use the centralized util.ExpandPath function
after the path expansion logic was extracted to internal/util/dirs.go.

Changes:
- archiver_test.go: remove local expandPath helper (now uses util.ExpandPath)
- logger_test.go: update to use shared utility
- tracker_test.go: update to use shared utility
- dirs_test.go: add tests for ExpandPath edge cases
- beads: sync GitHub issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -740,6 +740,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3vnmq","title":"E2E Tests: Privacy mode prevents persistence","description":"## Goal
Verify privacy mode prevents writing prompt history/event logs/archives.

## Scenario
- Start an NTM session with `--privacy`.
- Send a prompt and generate output.
- Run commands that would normally write:
  - prompt history save
  - event log append
  - output archive/checkpoint
- Verify:
  - commands refuse with a clear error OR they write only minimal metadata (per spec)

## Test Harness + Isolation
- Implement as Go E2E tests under `e2e/` with the existing build tag (`//go:build e2e`).
- Tests must be hermetic:
  - set `HOME` and/or `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to `t.TempDir()` so NTM writes only into temp locations
  - avoid reading/modifying the developer’s real config or history

## Logging Requirements
- Use `e2e.TestLogger` (writes to `E2E_LOG_DIR` or `/tmp/ntm-e2e-logs`).
- Structured per-test logging with:
  - `test_run_id`
  - session name
  - privacy mode enabled
- Log:
  - all command lines
  - stdout/stderr
  - file paths checked for presence/absence
  - directory listings (bounded) for relevant artifact dirs

## Acceptance Criteria
- Default unit suite remains green: `go test ./...`.
- E2E suite passes: `go test -tags e2e ./e2e`.
- Test logs include the exact files/paths checked.
- Assertions ensure privacy mode does not silently persist user text.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:24:55.090939922Z","created_by":"OrangeWolf","updated_at":"2026-02-02T02:49:19.758954830Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T02:49:19.758821551Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vnmq","depends_on_id":"bd-26364","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:24:55.103943603Z","created_by":"OrangeWolf"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vnmq","depends_on_id":"bd-35sy7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:24:55.097053746Z","created_by":"OrangeWolf"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3vtci","title":"Task: Unit tests for Agent Activity Timeline","description":"## Overview
Comprehensive unit tests for the agent activity timeline visualization system.

## COMPLETED TESTS (by FrostyBasin)

### Event Tracking Tests (timeline_test.go)
- ✅ TestRecordEvent_RepeatedStates - Verifies repeated states stored without compression
- ✅ TestRecordEvent_StateTransitionDetails - Tests details and trigger fields
- ✅ TestGetEventsInTimeRange - Edge cases for time boundary filtering
- ✅ TestConcurrentCallbackSafety - Verifies callbacks don't deadlock

### Timeline Panel Tests (timeline_panel_test.go)
- ✅ TestTimelinePanel_Scroll - Full scroll left/right coverage including boundary conditions

## BLOCKED TESTS (waiting on dependencies)

### Event Marker Tests (markers_test.go) - BLOCKED by bd-ptu2
### Export Tests (export_test.go) - BLOCKED by bd-1h9p
### Persistence Tests (timeline_persist_test.go) - BLOCKED by bd-352u

## Test Fixtures
```go
var testEvents = []AgentEvent{
    {AgentID: "cc_1", State: Working, Timestamp: t0},
    {AgentID: "cc_1", State: Idle, Timestamp: t0.Add(5*time.Minute)},
    {AgentID: "cc_2", State: Working, Timestamp: t0.Add(1*time.Minute)},
    {AgentID: "cc_2", State: Error, Timestamp: t0.Add(3*time.Minute)},
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- 90%+ code coverage
- All tests pass in CI
- No flaky tests
- Tests run in <10 seconds","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T20:20:37.903281614Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:09:30.775990680Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-1h9p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-2t7n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-352u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-3h0n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-f815","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","depends_on_id":"bd-ptu2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":38,"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed Event Marker Tests: Added comprehensive marker tests to internal/state/timeline_test.go covering TestMarkerTypeSymbol, TestMarkerTypeString, TestAddMarker (subtests for basic, custom ID, details), TestGetMarkers (all, since, range), TestGetMarkersForAgent, TestGetMarkersForSession, TestOnMarkerAdd, TestPruneMarkers, TestClearMarkers, TestMarkerConcurrentAccess, TestMarkerIDSequence, plus benchmarks. Also added timeline panel marker tests in panels/timeline_test.go. All tests passing. Export Tests still blocked by bd-1h9p, Persistence Tests still blocked by bd-352u.","created_at":"2026-01-22T04:26:02Z"},{"id":39,"issue_id":"bd-3vtci","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added timeline panel stats line test in internal/tui/dashboard/panels/timeline_test.go (agents/events/markers/span). go test ./internal/tui/dashboard passes.","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:09:30Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3vurv","title":"Task: Web UI comms deck (Mail + Reservations)","description":"## Scope\nImplement Comms deck: Agent Mail inbox, thread view, and file reservation map.\n\n## Implementation\n- Inbox list with filters (importance, ack_required).\n- Thread view with reply/ack/read actions.\n- Reservation map grouped by file path + conflict highlighting.\n\n## Logging\n- Client logs for send/ack actions (dev only).\n\n## Tests\n- E2E: open thread, reply, mark read, ack.\n- Unit: reservation grouping + conflict indicators.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Mail flows work end‑to‑end via REST/MCP.\n- Reservation conflicts are visualized and updated live.\n","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:53:01.296439365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T23:11:10.555602591Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vurv","depends_on_id":"bd-1kq4p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vurv","depends_on_id":"bd-35i7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3vurv","depends_on_id":"bd-6z2bf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-3vx3u","title":"Bug: Fix archive tests after ExpandPath refactor","description":"Fix tests after util.ExpandPath refactor.

- internal/archive/archiver_test.go referenced removed local helper expandPath; update to call internal/util.ExpandPath and broaden coverage (~/, ~\\).
- Add internal/util/dirs_test.go to cover util.ExpandPath behavior.

Acceptance:
- go test ./internal/archive passes
- go test ./internal/util passes

 {"id":"bd-43oxm","title":"Unit Tests: Robot Probe","description":"Unit tests for Robot Probe command with comprehensive coverage.

## Test Coverage

### Baseline Capture Tests
- Test successful baseline capture
- Test capture with empty pane
- Test capture failure handling (session not found)
- Test content hash generation
- Test baseline comparison (changed vs unchanged)

### Flag Parsing Tests
- Test default flag values
- Test valid method flags (keystroke_echo, interrupt_test)
- Test invalid method flag error
- Test timeout range validation (100-60000)
- Test aggressive flag validation
- Test structured error output for invalid flags

### Keystroke Echo Tests
- Test responsive pane detection
- Test unresponsive pane detection
- Test latency measurement accuracy
- Test content diff detection
- Test null byte sending

### Interrupt Test Tests
- Test responsive detection
- Test interrupt behavior warning in output
- Test unresponsive detection
- Test single Ctrl-C vs double-tap distinction

### Confidence Tests
- Test high confidence: clear response, latency < 1000ms
- Test high confidence: definitely unresponsive (no activity)
- Test medium confidence: slow response
- Test medium confidence: ambiguous change
- Test low confidence: no response but process active
- Test recommendation mapping (healthy, likely_stuck, etc.)

### Timeout Tests
- Test custom timeout handling
- Test timeout expiry behavior
- Test deadline enforcement

### Edge Cases
- Test probe during pane rapid output
- Test probe during ultrathink (long processing)
- Test concurrent probes

## Logging Requirements

All tests must log:
```json
{"test": "keystroke_echo_responsive", "input": {...}, "expected": {...}, "actual": {...}, "passed": true}
```

## Mocking Strategy

- Mock tmux capture-pane output for various states
- Mock send-keys for probe input
- Simulate responsive/unresponsive scenarios
- Mock process activity checks","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T23:33:33.489747284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:13:08.235424577Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T05:13:08.235281417Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-43oxm","depends_on_id":"bd-1cu1f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-43oxm","depends_on_id":"bd-30nv1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-43oxm","depends_on_id":"bd-3ah0k","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-43oxm","depends_on_id":"bd-x0f5i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}]}
